summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TaskFlow Enterprise app. Fixed frontend TypeScript error (formatLabel pipe type issue). All 34 backend API tests passing (100%). All major UI flows verified working: Login, Dashboard, Tasks CRUD, Meetings, Projects, Calendar, Reports, Admin, Signup.

design_issues.screen: Project form and Task form - date fields
issues: Date pickers use browser native UI (input[type=date]) instead of custom styled calendar component. Minor UX consideration.

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed TypeScript error in FormatLabelPipe - added method overload signature to properly accept string | undefined type
Previous zone.js fix from iteration_1 is working correctly - all components rendering properly
The formatLabel pipe is now correctly showing 'In Progress' instead of 'In_progress' on dashboard status badges
seed_data_creation: Created test data via API tests: TEST_API Test Task (TSK-0004, TSK-0005), TEST_API Test Meeting (MTG-0002), TEST_API Test Project (PRJ-0002, PRJ-0003)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major flows verified working. Backend API tests comprehensive (34 tests covering auth, tasks, meetings, projects, dashboard, admin, calendar, reports, notifications). Frontend Angular app building successfully after formatLabel pipe fix. Zone.js fix from previous iteration still working.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: FormatLabelPipe transform method was typed to accept 'string | null | undefined' but Angular's strict template type checking requires proper overload signatures when the pipe can receive optional chained values (e.g., auth.currentUser?.role).
rca_of_the_issue.reproduction: Frontend build failed with TS2345 error on topbar.component.html line 58 when using {{ auth.currentUser?.role | formatLabel }}
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Added method overload signature 'transform(value: string | null | undefined): string;' before the implementation signature in format-label.pipe.ts

verified_features.dashboard: Working - shows task stats, priority breakdown, status breakdown (formatLabel pipe verified showing 'In Progress'), recent tasks, team workload
verified_features.tasks_page: Working - list with filters, search, task creation
verified_features.task_detail: Working - TSK-0001 displays correctly with comments, attachments, subtasks, activity tabs
verified_features.projects_page: Working - list view with project cards showing progress
verified_features.calendar_page: Working - calendar view with tasks and meetings displayed
verified_features.reports_page: Working - multiple report types (Overdue Tasks, Task Aging, User Productivity, Department Performance, Project Progress)
verified_features.admin_page: Working - Users and Master Data sections
verified_features.master_data: Working - Departments, Locations, Companies, Designations tabs
